name: CPG hybrid — fitness v4 (anti-hop penalties, warm-start from exp003)
sigma0_note: Reduced from 0.5 — warm-starting from exp003 best; refine rather than explore wildly
changes_from_exp003: Added pitch_rate_penalty: sum of |obs[2]| per step × W_PITCH_RATE=0.05
Added airborne_penalty: count of steps where both foot forces < 20N × W_AIRBORNE=0.5
FALL_PENALTY: 100 → 200 (falling is now very costly, discourages momentum build-up)

fitness_function.formula: cumulative_distance*30 + upright*0.2 + velocity*0.5 + speed_bonus*2.0 + time_alive*0.05 - pitch_rate*0.05 - airborne*0.5 - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*200

rationale.hopping_diagnosis: exp003 achieved 985.43 with 2 hops then fall. The speed_bonus (any v > 1.0 m/s) was satisfied cheapest by a ballistic hop: both feet push simultaneously, body launches. After 2–3 hops torso pitch momentum exceeds Walker2d health threshold (>1.0 rad).
rationale.pitch_rate_penalty: obs[2] = torso pitch angular velocity. Hopper: |pitch_rate| ~ 3–8 rad/s at landing. Walker: |pitch_rate| ~ 0.1–0.5 rad/s. Penalising the sum makes hopping costly even mid-flight and landing. At 5 rad/s average over 300 steps, penalty = 300×5×0.05 = 75 pts.
rationale.airborne_penalty: Both feet off ground simultaneously defines a hop. A walker always has at least one foot in contact (cfrc_ext force > 20N). At 300 airborne steps: 300×0.5 = 150 pts penalty for hopper, 0 for walker.
rationale.combined_effect: Hopper at exp003 quality would now lose ~150+75+200(fall) = 425 pts vs exp003. A walking gait at 1.5 m/s would gain all speed_bonus with ~0 anti-hop penalties. Net advantage of walking over hopping: ~425 pts.

result.gait_description: Sustained hopping for a long time — significantly more stable than exp003's 2-hop-then-fall. Anti-hop penalties successfully discouraged the immediate-fall pattern. Score 2028.1 exceeds predicted ~1750, suggesting the walker also learned some speed optimisation.

diagnosis.problem: Still primarily a hopping gait rather than alternating-leg walk. The pitch_rate and airborne penalties discouraged falling but hopping with good pitch control is still a local optimum.
diagnosis.effect: Long sustained hops — creature is fast and stable but not walking. Each hop is more controlled. The FALL_PENALTY=200 discourages falling so the creature learned to land stably.
diagnosis.fix_in_next: exp005: reward alternating foot contact pattern explicitly. Add foot-contact-alternation bonus that only pays when feet contact the ground in left-right alternation (gait symmetry reward).
